newsletter.executive_summary: This edition tracks 2 notable FMCG deal-related developments, with 'acquisition' activity leading the pack. Highlights include movement around Hindustan Unilever to acquire D2C skincare brand Minimalist, Dabur India explores acquisition of herbal FMCG startup. As always, treat lower-credibility items as directional rather than confirmed.
